subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-29 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Glad tidings of the Kingdom of Abha! We announce to you Glad-tidings of great Joy!... Similar words were spoken almost two thousand years ago.
subcodes.subjects: @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @oneness; unity of religion, @universal language, @universal peace; world unity, @prophecy and fulfillment
